title: Max Healthcare International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Max Healthcare International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Consultant Physician to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!
